title: thelypteris leprieurii var. costalis
intro: Thelypteris leprieurii var. costalis is a species of fern, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the mosquito fern due to its ability to repel mosquitoes and other insects. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris leprieurii var. costalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, and can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties.
